scripts._: // bytecode build MUST use vendored bun (vendor/bun/build/release/bun-profile)
scripts._2: // — JSC bytecode is tied to a specific JSC version. The version libskal
scripts._3: // links against IS the vendored one. If we use $PATH bun (typically the
scripts._4: // developer's system bun, currently 1.3.13 by coincidence), drift between
scripts._5: // it and vendor/bun's JSC silently invalidates the .jsc cache at runtime
scripts._6: // → fallback to parsing → cold-start regression with no error. Per
